# Sand Pack Flooding

**Summary**: A method to evaluate the permeability and consolidation of a sand pack under flow conditions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-baig|Baig, 2023]] performed sand-pack flooding experiments to determine the impact of EICP on permeability and sand production.

## Key Results and Findings

- AN 125 resulted in less permeability reduction (30%) compared to cellulose (50%) while achieving higher consolidation (75%). ([[2023-baig|Baig, 2023, p. 73]])
